allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; Get-Command git.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)

PowerShell($ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue'; $url = "https://github.com/mazzeoia/MazyOS/archive/refs/heads/main.zip"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile "MazyOS.zip" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "OK main" } catch { Write-Output "main falhou, tentando master"; try { Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://github.com/mazzeoia/MazyOS/archive/refs/heads/master.zip" -OutFile "MazyOS.zip" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "OK master" } catch { Write-Output "ERRO: $_" } })

PowerShell(foreach \($d in @\("clientes","briefings","propostas"\)\) { if \(-not \(Test-Path $d\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $d | Out-Null }; $gk = Join-Path $d ".gitkeep"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $gk\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Path $gk | Out-Null } }; Write-Output "Pastas criadas"; Get-ChildItem -Directory -Name)
